summary: Comprehensive testing of Vendor Inventory Form upgrade. All features working: 6-section form (Basic Information, Fabric Specifications, Images & Videos, Inventory & Pricing, Availability, Description & Tags), composition editor with 3-material % totaling, bulk pricing tiers, availability toggles (Sample/Bulk/On Request), sample/bulk delivery days, and admin approval flow.
passed_tests: Vendor login at /vendor/login with vendor@test.com / vendor123
Navigate to /vendor/inventory - fabric list loads correctly
Add Fabric button opens comprehensive form modal
Form Section 1: Basic Information - Fabric Name, Seller SKU, Category fields present

Form Section 2: Fabric Specifications - Fabric Type, Pattern, Color, Weight Unit, GSM/Ounce, Width, Composition editor (3 materials with % totaling), Warp/Weft Count, Shrinkage, Stretch, Finish fields present
Form Section 3: Images & Videos - Upload areas present
Form Section 4: Inventory & Pricing - Stock, Base Rate, MOQ, Sample/Bulk Delivery Days, Sample Price, Bulk Pricing Tiers (with Add Tier button) present
Form Section 5: Availability - Sample/Bulk/On Request toggle buttons work correctly, Enable direct booking checkbox present
Form Section 6: Description & Tags - Description textarea and Tags input present
Form submission creates fabric with 'Pending Approval' status
Toast notification shows 'Fabric submitted for approval'
New fabric appears in inventory list with correct data
Edit button opens form with all fields pre-populated correctly
Composition shows materials with percentages (Cotton 70%, Polyester 30%) and Total: 100%
Availability toggles show selected state (Sample Available, Bulk Available selected)
Admin login at /admin/login with admin@locofast.com / admin123
Navigate to /admin/sellers - seller cards load
Click View on Test Fabrics Co. seller
Seller detail page shows Profile tab with Basic Information and Business Details
SKUs tab shows pending count badge (4 pending)
SKUs tab lists vendor fabrics with Approve/Reject/Delete action buttons
Approve button (checkmark) approves pending fabric
Toast shows 'fabric_name approved'
Fabric status changes from 'Pending' to 'Live'
Pending count decreases after approval
critical_code_review_comments: VendorInventory.js: Well-structured 720-line component with comprehensive form handling
Composition editor correctly validates total must equal 100% before submission
Pricing tiers support dynamic add/remove with proper min/max qty ranges
Availability toggles use proper state management with array includes/filter
Edit form correctly parses and pre-populates all field types including arrays and nested objects
vendor_router.py: FabricCreate/FabricUpdate models properly handle all new fields
cloudinary_router.py: verify_admin now accepts vendor tokens for upload access
api.js interceptor correctly routes vendor tokens for /vendor/* and /cloudinary/* endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_Denim_Fabric and TEST_Denim_Fabric_77afac69 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Inventory Form fully tested with all 6 sections working. Test Fabrics Co. seller (vendor@test.com) has fabrics with various statuses. Admin can approve/reject fabrics from /admin/sellers/:id -> SKUs tab. Cloudinary uploads work for vendors. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_vendor_inventory.py cover all CRUD operations and admin approval flow.

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/vendor/fabrics: 200 OK - Create fabric with comprehensive fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cloudinary/signature: 200 OK - Vendor can get upload signature
